Intraday post (15/Dec)

Weekly post:

OpEx, VIX expo, CPI and BoJ meeting - Weekly post (15-19/Dec)

(I attached the March ES contracts too. In the intraday script inputs I use only the ESH26 contract)

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

Customers are buying downside vol and upside vol, net speed profile is flat-to-positive, with net flat-to-negative gamma. Vol of vol is sold both ways.

The centroid of the profile is at 6835.44 - 6844.43, that is a pretty sticky zone, with 6850 pin potential.

Upside pivot is at 6887.78with target of 6900 (local magnet)There is a chance to break this zone, (but I would mark the 6870 as well) until 1.30PMOtherwise a pin to 6850 is likely.

Downside pivot is at 6810.29with downside target of 6795, with a reversion back to 6850 if move is fast, or 6815 if move is stuck at 6828/30.

There is more vol bought to the upside, than to the downside, and there is more room to move upward than downward.Also, as speed profile is net positive, to the upside, there is a chance for the spot to stabilize, while in case of downside scenario, it is more like a reversion trade back towards the centroid. Left-tailish scenario would be a local oscillation at 6800 with constant skew bid, and then 6750 gap fill (with 6770 local line in the sand).

The mains bet is a pin at the center. Upside/downside scenario is almost symmetrically priced-in for today. Sentiment is tense.For me, this profile doesn’t worth the risk to trade, maybe some upside vol selling… we’ll see… I don’t see good intraday risk/reward.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
